title: Mitel security advisory (AV26-611)
description: On June 17, 2026, Mitel published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: MiVoice Business Solution Virtual Instance (MiVB SVI) - version 2.1.0.9-2 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
